# My Test Project

## Overview

A minimal project at pre-v1.11 state. No vault-layout row, no .ark-workflow/
gitignore entry, no OMC routing block, no setup-vault-symlink.sh.

## Project Configuration

| Topic | Location |
|-------|----------|
| **Task Management** | `vault/TaskNotes/` — prefix: `Test-` |

## Notes

Some user-authored content that must not be touched by ark-update.
